summary: The available information does not support a link between c-kit activation and uveal melanoma cell proliferation; thus, targeting c-kits for therapy remains speculative without direct biological evidence. This lack of mechanistic insight limits any current recommendation regarding c-kit as a viable treatment strategy for this specific cancer type.
